name: ASUS PRO WS TRX50-SAGE WIFI A CEB Workstation Motherboard - Socket sTR5 - up to 1TB of R-DIMM DDR5 - 3x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - Marvell AQtion 10Gb LAN - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 802.11be - 2x USB4 Type-C - 2x DisplayPort IN
shortName: ASUS PRO WS TRX50-SAGE WIFI A CEB Workstation Motherboard - Socket
description: High-end workstation motherboard with sTR5 socket for HEDT systems, offering massive PCIe 5.0 bandwidth and Wi-Fi 7.
